hypotheses.title: Filter Integrity Failure
hypotheses.description: The 0.22 micron sterilizing-grade filter used during the sterile filtration step failed to maintain integrity, allowing passage of Gram-negative organisms into the filtered product stream.

hypotheses.title: Environmental Monitoring Breach in Grade A Zone
hypotheses.description: Environmental monitoring data indicates a breach in the Grade A zone microbial control, with settle plate or active air sampling results approaching or exceeding action limits prior to the manufacturing date.

hypotheses.title: Personnel Gowning Protocol Deviation
hypotheses.description: A deviation from the sterile gowning protocol by one or more operators introduced a contamination vector into the Grade A filling zone during batch manufacturing.
